creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


First, portmaster doesn't install /usr/local/etc/portmaster.rc, the user has 
to create it. So portmaster is not breaking any rules here. Second, I'm not 
sure you understand the distinction between LOCALBASE and PREFIX. The former 
is where the local files are already installed on the system. The latter is 
where the port will install files with the current operation.  


hope this helps, 

Doug
